entries.title: Public Narrative Charter
entries.summary: Sets clear publication standards for tone, attribution, versioning, and channel consistency across citizen-facing materials under the layered republic v3.0 governance substrate.

entries.title: Visual Identity Guidelines
entries.owner: Design Guild / Secretary of External Affairs
entries.summary: Canonical palette, typography, layout guidance, and cross-platform asset rules for external-facing representation aligned with protocol v3.0 metadata and interchange standards.

entries.title: Community Reading Channel
entries.owner: Civic Assembly / Secretary of External Affairs
entries.summary: Rotating study cadence for charter, manifesto, protocol, and treaty documents with synchronized translation tabs and accessibility overlays under treaty obligations.

entries.title: Cultural Exchange Series
entries.summary: Curated regional contributions, open-collaborative storytelling sprints, and external outreach aligned with layered-republic values and diplomatic framing under consular guidance.

entries.title: Media Standards Playbook
entries.owner: Protocol Committee / Secretary of External Affairs
entries.summary: Superseded publication rules retained for historical compliance audits and changelog review under layered republic v3.0 standards.

entries.title: Open Contribution Framework
entries.summary: Transparent, protocol-compliant submission rules for approved work, citizen contributions, and external outreach channels across the layered republic with attribution verification gates.

entries.title: Ambassador Storytelling Campaign
entries.owner: Consular Network / Secretary of External Affairs
entries.summary: Coordinated ambassador-led community events, narrative recordings, and cross-regional cultural exchange coordinated under diplomatic protocols and reciprocity commitments.

entries.title: Accessibility Review Sprint
entries.summary: Multi-pass accessibility review for public-facing narrative, media, and external assets with layered-republic sign-off and publication-boundary checks.

pillars.title: Cultural Sovereignty
pillars.summary: Preserve and evolve digital-native cultural forms with verifiable provenance.

pillars.title: Creative Commons
pillars.summary: Shared creative infrastructure with attribution, remix rights, and fair compensation.

pillars.title: Heritage Continuity
pillars.summary: Long-term archival of founding documents, debates, and cultural milestones.
